zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Scudamore於1310年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾比 多雷時，她的父親Walter Scudamore30歲，母親Margery15歲。她和Sir John Beaumont至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1388年在英國英格蘭戴文維爾享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Scudamore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Skidmore
meanings: English (Staffordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Scudamore, which most probably arises from a Norman French nickname for a knight who used a particular type of leather shield, from the unrecorded Norman French phrase, escu de more ‘Moor's shield’, a reference to a type of Moorish leather shield called an adarga, which was in widespread use not only in medieval Iberia and north Africa but also in Brittany.

History: The manor of Upton Scudamore in Wiltshire was held by Peter de Skydemore in 1216. The same manor was held by Godfrey Escudamore shortly after 1150. The Scudamore family claim descent from Ralph, recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holder of Opeton (Upton), whose son was known as Reginald Escudemor.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Scudamore was born in 1310, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Scudamore, was 30 and her mother, Margery, was 15. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Sir John Beaumont. She died in 1388, in Shirwell, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Scudamore(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Scudamore(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Beaumont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 실웰에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.
